description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet featuring the iconic Donkey Kong branding. The cabinet is predominantly blue with metallic trim and displays a large, colorful marquee at the top, showcasing Donkey Kong characters and the Nintendo logo. The front panel houses a CRT display screen with a visible game interface, a control panel with multiple buttons and a joystick, and a coin slot mechanism below. The side panels are adorned with vibrant, cartoon-style graphics depicting Donkey Kong and related characters, adding to its retro appeal. The back of the cabinet is solid blue with a large, detailed Donkey Kong 3 decal. The overall structure is robust, boxy, and designed for public use in arcades or urban entertainment spaces.
description: A blue, upright Donkey Kong arcade cabinet with colorful side graphics, a marquee, a CRT screen, and a control panel with buttons and a joystick.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Donkey Kong marquee, CRT screen, control panel with buttons and joystick, and coin slot.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large, round Donkey Kong character graphic and the cabinet's angular profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid blue back with a large, rectangular Donkey Kong 3 decal.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, featuring the same Donkey Kong character artwork and cabinet shape.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, curved, medium size with a visible bezel around the screen.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and multiple round buttons, arranged in a row, with colorful artwork and markings.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features vibrant Donkey Kong-themed artwork with cartoon characters, blue and red colors, and the Nintendo logo in a retro style.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Large, colorful cartoon-style Donkey Kong graphics with characters and thematic elements on both side panels.
